Welcome.Subject: Welcome to Wyvern, {{username}}!
Welcome.Title: Welcome, {{username}}!
Welcome.Body: We're thrilled to have you join the Wyvern family. Let's get you set up!
Welcome.ActionPrompt: To start exploring, please verify your account:
Welcome.LinkExpiry: This verification link is valid for 30 minutes.
Welcome.Support: Need help? Contact us at support@wyvern.gg or check the official Wyvern community.

Username.TooShort: Username must be at least 2 characters long.
Username.TooLong: Username may not be longer than 15 characters.
Username.InvalidCharacters: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, or underscores.
Username.RepeatedSymbols: Username cannot contain consecutive dots or underscores.

Password.TooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Password.TooLong: Password must be at most 64 characters.
Password.MissingUpper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
Password.MissingLower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
Password.MissingDigit: Password must contain at least one number.
Password.MissingSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.

Email.TooLong: Email must be at most 320 characters.
Email.InvalidSymbol: Email must contain a single '@' symbol.
Email.UnresolvableDomain: Email domain could not be resolved.

Register.VerifyEmailRequired: Almost there! Check your inbox and verify your email to finish signing up.
Register.InvalidInvite: The provided invite code is invalid.
Register.InviteOnly: Registration is currently invite-only. Please provide a valid invite code to continue.
